levels.body: Usually, “lurid” describes something “[p]ale and dismal in colour” (“lurid, *adj*.” 1.); here, it is used to describe the colour of the sky at sunset: “[s]hining with a red glow or glare amid darkness” (“lurid, *adj*.” 2.a.).
worksCited: “lurid, *adj.*” 1. and 2.a. *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, December 2021, www.oed.com/view/Entry/111313. Accessed 17 February 2022.
